title: Fun Items
description: Adds a lot of fun items: Death Rod, Fire Spell, Lightning Rod, Recoil Stick, TNT Arrow
body:
# Fun Items
**Spell Book** - sets fire to an entity when it hits it   
**Death Rod** - instantly kills an entity on hit   
**Lightning Rod** - creates lightning when hitting an entity   
**Recoil Stick** - pushes the entity away   
**TNT Arrow** - explodes on impact at the arrow’s landing point   

## Usage:
```
/funitems <item>
```
